creator: antoine@FreeBSD.org
text:
Those 3 files are affected by both this exp-run and exp-run from bug #194038 :

misc/gnome-devel-docs/Makefile
misc/gnome-user-docs/Makefile
x11-themes/gnome-themes-standard/Makefile

I will merge the 2 (the patches do not seem to conflict) and continue the exp-run on a merge of the 2.
